items.text_for_match: Arsenal pass derby test of nerve as title race looks set to go to wire Arsenal passed the north London derby test with flying colours as Premier League title race looks likely to go to the wire, says chief football writer Phil McNulty Arsenal passed the north London derby test with flying colours as Premier League title race looks likely to go to the wire, says chief football writer Phil McNulty

items.ja: It's absolutely OK to face fans' criticism - Glasner
items.en: It's absolutely OK to face fans' criticism - Glasner
items.text_for_match: It's absolutely OK to face fans' criticism - Glasner Oliver Glasner says it is "absolutely OK" to "face criticism" after some Crystal Palace fans again questioned his immediate future as manager. Oliver Glasner says it is "absolutely OK" to "face criticism" after some Crystal Palace fans again questioned his immediate future as manager.

items.ja: Guardiola tells team to chill with cocktails as Man City pile pressure on Arsenal
items.en: Guardiola tells team to chill with cocktails as Man City pile pressure on Arsenal
items.text_for_match: Guardiola tells team to chill with cocktails as Man City pile pressure on Arsenal As Manchester City continue to crank up the pressure on Arsenal, Pep Guardiola tells his players to take three days off to "enjoy life" with "caipirinhas and daiquiris". As Manchester City continue to crank up the pressure on Arsenal, Pep Guardiola tells his players to take three days off to "enjoy life" with "caipirinhas and daiquiris".

items.ja: Deal with 'noise' or join another club - Arteta
items.en: Deal with 'noise' or join another club - Arteta
items.text_for_match: Deal with 'noise' or join another club - Arteta  Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta says his players should "be part of a different club" if they can not deal with the "noise" as his team bid to end their 22-year wait for a league title. Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta says his players should "be part of a different club" if they can not deal with the "noise" as his team bid to end their 22-year wait for a league title.

items.ja: Analysis: Chelsea undone by two Achilles heels
items.en: Analysis: Chelsea undone by two Achilles heels
items.text_for_match: Analysis: Chelsea undone by two Achilles heels Red cards and set-pieces are problems that existed at Chelsea long before Rosenior arrived, says Chris Wise. Red cards and set-pieces are problems that existed at Chelsea long before Rosenior arrived, says Chris Wise.
